title: How Y Combinator's CEO ACTUALLY Uses Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Garry Tan, CEO of Y Combinator, uses Claude Code to generate 600,000 lines of code in 60 days. The breakdown covers four strategies: giving Claude a role, running parallel sessions, building custom tools, and planning before building. Marchese references gstack, Tan's open-source Claude Code system.
